summary: Phase 7 Health Insights testing complete. All backend endpoints (19/19) and frontend features working correctly. Risk model routing (WHO/ISH for India, SCORE2 for Europe, QRISK3 for UK) functioning as specified. Mistral integration generating structured analysis with Louise-Hay-inspired affirmations including beliefPattern and rationale. Opt-in flow, profile form, and report display all working. Existing Somatic UX unchanged and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health/models - returns 3 models (qrisk3, score2, who_ish)
Backend: POST /api/health/risk - India region selects WHO/ISH primary + QRISK3 secondary
Backend: POST /api/health/risk - Europe region selects SCORE2 primary + QRISK3 secondary
Backend: POST /api/health/risk - UK region selects QRISK3 primary
Backend: POST /api/health/risk - response includes inputsUsed, missingInputs, limitations, selectionRationale, score, band
Backend: POST /api/health/analyze - returns structured JSON with summary, tests[3], lifestyle[3], affirmations[2], disclaimer
Backend: POST /api/health/analyze - affirmations contain text, beliefPattern, rationale
Backend: POST /api/health/analyze - caching works (second identical call returns cached:true)
Backend: POST /api/health/analyze - force=true bypasses cache
Backend: GET /api/health/reports - returns recent reports with primaryModel, primaryScore, primaryBand
Backend: POST /api/affirmations/condition - accepts valid conditionKey (stress, hypertension_risk)
Backend: POST /api/affirmations/condition - rejects unknown keys with 400
Backend: POST /api/affirmations/condition - returns 3 affirmations with text, beliefPattern, rationale
Backend Regression: GET /api/ - version check
Backend Regression: GET /api/affirmations/today
Backend Regression: POST /api/snapshot
Backend Regression: POST /api/insight
Backend Regression: POST /api/journal
Backend Regression: POST /api/practice
Backend Regression: GET /api/streak
Backend Regression: POST /api/notify-me
Frontend: Bottom nav has 5 tabs (Home, Scan, Insights, History, Profile)
Frontend: Insights tab activates correctly when on /insights/*
Frontend: /insights - shows opt-in card when localStorage 'somatic.healthOptedIn' is absent
Frontend: /insights - after clicking 'Turn on Health Insights' becomes main Insights screen
Frontend: /insights - profile card and generate report CTA visible after opt-in
Frontend: /insights/profile - all form fields render (region, ethnicity, age, sex, smoking, BP, BMI, cholesterol, diabetes, family history, treated hypertension, CKD, AF, RA)
Frontend: /insights/profile - Save persists to localStorage and navigates back
Frontend: /insights/report - loads and shows primary score card with band-colored border
Frontend: /insights/report - secondary models comparison chips visible
Frontend: /insights/report - plain-language summary card visible
Frontend: /insights/report - tests card with 3 tests visible
Frontend: /insights/report - lifestyle card with 3 suggestions visible
Frontend: /insights/report - affirmations card with 2 affirmations visible
Frontend: /insights/report - Louise-Hay affirmation card shows 'BELIEF LOUISE ASSOCIATED WITH THIS' and 'WHY THIS MAKES SENSE' subheadings
Frontend: /insights/report - paraphrasing footer 'Inspired by Louise L. Hay's teachings — paraphrased, not quoted.' present
Frontend: /insights/report - disclaimer visible and mentions 'not a diagnosis'
Frontend: /insights/report - model limitations visible
Frontend Regression: Home page accessible and loads
Frontend Regression: Scan page accessible and loads
Frontend Regression: History page accessible and loads
Frontend Regression: Profile page accessible and loads
Frontend Regression: Navigation between all 5 tabs works correctly
